sample_requests: Map free-text cell labels in obs['cell_label'] to Cell Ontology terms with the default mpnet-base-v2 sentence transformer
Cohort uses heavy abbreviations like 'TIL-1' / 'TA-Early' - set up LLM expansion with tissue_context='gut' / species='mouse' and re-map
Add Cell Taxonomy enhancement for a mouse-gut cohort with threshold=0.3
List the top-10 CL matches for a single label without modifying any AnnData
Use a custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint (base_url) for LLM expansion

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/single/_cellmatch.py. LLM expansion would require an OpenAI key for a live smoke run; not executed.
